description_long: This is a tall, slender stone sculpture featuring a detailed figurative group at the top, likely depicting a seated robed figure holding another figure in their arms, reminiscent of religious or memorial statuary. The sculpture is mounted on a square pedestal base, which transitions into a long, rectangular column that supports the upper sculptural group. The surface appears weathered, with subtle variations in gray tones, suggesting it is made of stone or concrete. The base is robust and slightly wider than the column, providing stability. The overall form is vertical and monumental, with the figurative group as the focal point. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or additional decorative elements on the pedestal or column.
description: A tall stone sculpture with a figurative group atop a slender column and square pedestal, featuring weathered gray tones and a monumental presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seated robed figure holding another figure, with the full height of the column and base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures at the top and the rectangular shape of the column.
description_view_2: Angled side view emphasizing the depth of the sculptural group and the layered structure of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the seated figure and the plain, unadorned column and base.
attribute_subject_matter: seated robed figure holding another figure, likely religious or memorial
attribute_location_context: No specific context visible; likely intended for outdoor urban or park settings.
